description: Staged market-path stress for Desk B StrategySpec (after dual-cost F2).

quick.notes: Small management-prep pack: dump, melt-up, gap/vol, grind. Quieter names fall back to normal_down/up when huge_* missing.

gates.notes: Path stress is management/tail prep — zero trades (stand-aside) and losing windows can still pass if risk bounds hold. Pack fails if too few windows available.

window.notes: Window length should cover entry DTE + pad so management (profit target, dte_stop, defined loss) can fire inside the path. Canonical TSLA/TSLL 21d windows used only when prefer_canonical and window_days≈21.
